n_planned.labelling_rule: any PIVOT-A6 route citing E8-D must label its evidence 'planted-drift' unless the natural secondary agrees (RT-10, quoted in P9 §1.1)

endpoints.test: DeLong test on ΔAUC vs the linear probe, α=0.05, pre-registered margin ΔAUC >= 0.05 (P1 HC4 verbatim); planted-drift primary

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: P1 §4b row HC4 (verbatim): Measured range: 125M–160M families (+1 ≥1B pair if E8-R passes). Envelope: Open-weights families ≤7B; qualitative only above that. Anchor: SAE feature-stability results (Templeton 2024, Paulo–Belrose seed-stability) span to mid-size production models; quantitative ρ does not transfer across SAE training regimes.
kill_criterion_verbatim: P1 §2 HC4 kill criterion, E8-D leg (verbatim): 'E8-D dead if the instrument fails to beat the linear probe by ΔAUC ≥ 0.05 (DeLong test, α=0.05) — then A6 is "alignment above chance, no downstream use" (decoration, per GDM's bar).'

corpus_hashes._recipe: sha256 over the sorted concatenation of '<relpath>:<file-sha256>\n' lines for every file under data/<corpus>/
corpus_hashes.natural-version-pairs: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:e8d.inputs (behavioural probes authored blind to the instrument)
corpus_hashes.planted-drift-finetunes: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:e8d.inputs (pre-declared per-concept drift magnitudes, before instrument contact)

runner_constraints.note: post-F2 infrastructure decision deferred by the maintainer at GNG-0; these pins are set by ops amendment or at this record's own freeze

title: E8-D — downstream GDM acceptance test: cross-version semantic-regression detection vs linear-probe baseline (HC4 leg 2; CONDITIONAL — freezes only after e8-r PASS; planted-drift primary + natural version-pair secondary per RT-10)
